name: Outlaw Standoff
short_description: Outlaw Standoff is a fast-paced Western reflex shooter. Face off against Outlaws, but don't hit sweet Miss Abigail, or it's Game Over! How many Outlaws can you take down before they outgun you?
detailed_description:
Do you have the fastest hand in the West?
Step into the dusty streets and face off against the Outlaw in this wild, Western standoff! As you take down Outlaws, they get quicker—can you keep up? But watch your aim, cowboy, because if you shoot the town’s sweet old lady, Miss Abigail... let's just say it won’t end well.

Outlaw Standoff is an action-packed test of your reflexes. Earn high scores, unlock achievements, and see how long you can survive before the Outlaw outguns you. Just remember: it's you, the Outlaw, and Miss Abigail... and only one of you should get hit!

Features:

  • Fast-paced standoffs with randomized Outlaw appearances.

  • Progressive difficulty: The better you do, the quicker the Outlaws get.

  • Steam Achievements to unlock and brag about.

  • Highscore tracking: Aim to be the quickest hand in the West!

  • And of course, don’t shoot Miss Abigail. She’s too sweet for that.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Ukrainian
